description: Job search tooling. Uses Harness Engineering for agent-driven development.

features.name: project-scaffold
features.description: Electron + React + Vite skeleton, electron-builder config, IPC bridge, dev/prod scripts

features.name: database-schema
features.description: SQLite via better-sqlite3: all 7 tables (boards, keywords, resume, jobs, activities, runs, settings), migrations runner

features.name: boards-management
features.description: CRUD UI + persistence for boards; saved CSS selector storage

features.name: keywords-management
features.description: CRUD UI + persistence for keywords; active/inactive toggle

features.name: resume-upload
features.description: Upload PDF/DOCX/TXT, extract raw text (pdf-parse + mammoth), store in DB

features.name: navigation-layout
features.description: Slack-style sidebar (Scout · Results · Pipeline · Boards & Keywords · Resume · Settings), dark/light theme toggle, Inter + JetBrains Mono fonts

features.name: scraping-engine
features.description: Playwright pipeline: navigate → find search bar (heuristic cascade + manual fallback) → search → paginate (date cutoff) → deduplicate → store

features.name: ai-matching
features.description: Ollama + Anthropic backends: resume skill profile (1 call, cached), batch scoring (5 jobs/call), match reason (top 10 jobs >= 70)

features.name: scout-screen
features.description: Run button, live progress log via IPC, date range selector (24h/7d/30d/60d/90d), last run timestamp, inline errors

features.name: results-screen
features.description: Ranked job list, filter tabs by status, score threshold slider, keyword chips, expandable card with activity log + status controls

features.name: pipeline-screen
features.description: Jobs in applying/applied/interviewing/offer/accepted/rejected grouped by status; quick-add activity button

features.name: settings-screen
features.description: AI backend selector, Ollama URL + model dropdown (from ollama list), Anthropic API key (writes .env), theme toggle, default date range, DB path
